mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_goal WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_goal ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_goal (user_id, goal_type, target_value, current_value, unit, start_date, target_date, status, progress, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{goalType}, #{targetValue}, #{currentValue}, #{unit}, #{startDate}, #{targetDate}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE health_goal SET progress = #{progress} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE health_goal SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
